sourcesContent:
<template>
  <v-card>
    <v-form ref="formRef" @submit.prevent="onCreatePaper()">
      <v-toolbar dark color="primary">
        <v-btn icon dark @click="close()">
          <v-icon>mdi-close</v-icon>
        </v-btn>
        <v-spacer></v-spacer>
          <v-btn dark text type="submit">Create Test</v-btn>
        </v-toolbar-items>
      </v-toolbar>
      <v-container>
        <v-row>
          <v-col>
            <v-card>
              <v-container>
                <v-row>
                  <v-col>
                    <v-container>
                      <v-text-field
                        solo
                        class="ml-8"
                        flat
                        filled
                        outlined
                        dense
                        label="Paper name"
                        v-model="paperName"
                        required
                      ></v-text-field>
                    </v-container>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
                <v-row>
                  <v-col>
                    <v-container>
                      <v-file-input
                        chips
                        multiple
                        dense
                        outlined
                        label="Imagem"
                      />
                    </v-container>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
                <v-row>
                  <v-col>
                    <Combined @inputData="updateData"></Combined>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
              </v-container>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
          <v-col>
            <v-card>
              <v-card-title>Preview</v-card-title>
              <v-card-subtitle>{{paperName}}</v-card-subtitle>
              <v-card-text>{{paperDescription}}</v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </v-form>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  data: () => ({
    paperDescription: null,
    paperName: null
  }),

  methods: {
    updateData(variable) {
      this.paperDescription = variable;
    },
    close() {
      this.setInitialData();
      this.$emit("closeDialogNew");
    },
    setInitialData() {
      this.paperDescription = null,
      this.paperName = null
    },
    onCreatePaper() {
      if(this.paperName === "" || this.paperDescription === "")
        return
    }
  }
}
</script>
